reviews.comment:
Es un muy buen lugar para hacer un alto en camino...se puede hacer pic nic en el espacio abierto que brinda a  todo el que pare alli. El socio tambien puede utilizar las instalaciones sanitarias o comprar algo para comer y beber...además de cargar nafta o revisar algo del vehículo.

(Translated by Google)
It's a great place to stop along the way...you can have a picnic in the open space available to everyone who stops there. Members can also use the restrooms or buy something to eat and drink...as well as fill up with gas or have their vehicle checked.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMtOGVhRTZ3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Pedí combo hamburguesa como papa y huevo , más caro que Mc y la verdad la carne de la hamburguesa 0 punto. Muy sucio el lugar una pena.

(Translated by Google)
I ordered a combo burger with fries and an egg, which was more expensive than McDonald's, and honestly, the burger meat was terrible. The place was very dirty, which is a shame.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMtOGR5T2h3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy limpios los baños y sin filas.
Lo único malo es la demora en la carga de combustible por falta de plateros, tendría que haber más gente.

(Translated by Google)
The restrooms were very clean and there were no lines. The only downside was the delay at the gas station due to a lack of attendants; there should be more staff.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMtc2NlbVdnEAE

reviews.comment:
Cómo siempre ACA lo mejor, limpieza, atención, baños, lugar de descanso, restoránte, parrilla, venta de productos regionales, Oficinas de at a Socios, repuestos, seguros, etc.

(Translated by Google)
As always, ACA is the best: cleanliness, service, restrooms, rest area, restaurant, grill, sale of regional products, Member Services Offices, spare parts, insurance, etc.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMtanJyand3RRAB

reviews.comment:
En realidad voy a opinar de la parte gastronómica porque combustible no cargué.
La atención de la empleada patética. Contestó de mala manera cuando se pidió que aplicará un descuento por socio de ACA (de hecho no lo aplicó al descuento). No nos Informó de promociones 2x1.
Nos trató mal. Cuando volvimos a mostrarle el mail con el número de socio vos dijo que ya no podía hacer nada. En fin reaccionó afirmativamente pero nunca nos atendió ni nos escuchó.
No vuelvo

(Translated by Google)
I'm actually going to give my opinion on the food because I didn't fill up with gas.
The employee's service was pathetic. She responded rudely when we asked if she could apply an ACA member discount (in fact, she didn't apply it to the discount). She didn't inform us about any 2-for-1 promotions.
She treated us poorly. When we showed her the email with our membership number again, she said there was nothing she could do. Anyway, she responded positively but never served us or listened to us.
I won't be back.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMtanJ6cnl3RRAB
